text: وَ يُعَلِّمُهُ‌ الْکِتَابَ‌ وَ الْحِکْمَةَ وَ التَّوْرَاةَ وَ الْإِنْجِيلَ‌

en.ahmedali: He will teach him the Law and the judgement, and the Torah and the Gospel,
en.ahmedraza: “And Allah will teach him the Book and wisdom, and the Taurat (Torah) and the Injeel (Bible).”
en.arberry: And He will teach him the Book, the Wisdom, the Torah, the Gospel,
en.daryabadi: And He shall teach him the Book and wisdom and the Taurat and the Injil:
en.hilali: And He (Allah) will teach him ['Iesa (Jesus)] the Book and Al-Hikmah (i.e. the Sunnah, the faultless speech of the Prophets, wisdom, etc.), (and) the Taurat (Torah) and the Injeel (Gospel).
en.itani: And He will teach him the Scripture and wisdom, and the Torah and the Gospel.
en.maududi: And He will teach him the Book, the Wisdom, the Torah, the Gospel,
en.mubarakpuri: And He will teach him the Book and Al-Hikmah, and the Tawrah and the Injil.
en.pickthall: And He will teach him the Scripture and wisdom, and the Torah and the Gospel,
en.qarai: He will teach him the Book and wisdom, the Torah and the Evangel,
en.qaribullah: He will teach him the Book, the Wisdom, the Torah and the Gospel,
en.sahih: And He will teach him writing and wisdom and the Torah and the Gospel
en.sarwar: God will give (Jesus) wisdom and teach him the Book, the Torah, and the Gospel.
en.shakir: And He will teach him the Book and the wisdom and the Tavrat and the Injeel.
en.wahiduddin: God will instruct him in the Book and in wisdom and in the Torah and in the Gospel.
en.yusufali: "And Allah will teach him the Book and Wisdom, the Law and the Gospel,
fa.ansarian: و به او کتاب و حکمت و تورات و انجیل می آموزد.
fa.ayati: خدا به او كتاب و حكمت و تورات و انجيل مى‌آموزد.
fa.bahrampour: و به او كتاب و حكمت و تورات و انجيل مى‌آموزد
fa.fooladvand: و به او كتاب و حكمت و تورات و انجيل مى‌آموزد.
fa.ghomshei: و خدا به او تعلیم کتاب و حکمت کند و تورات و انجیل آموزد.
fa.khorramdel: و بدو خطّ و کتابت، و دانش راستین و سودمند، و تورات و انجیل می‌آموزد. [[«کِتَابَ»: خطّ و کتابت. «یُعَلِّمُهُ الْکِتَابَ»: مراد این است که عیسی باسواد خواهد بود؛ نه بیسواد.]]
fa.khorramshahi: و به او کتاب و حکمت و تورات و انجیل می‌آموزد
fa.makarem: و به او، کتاب و دانش و تورات و انجیل، می‌آموزد.
fa.moezzi: و بیاموزدش کتاب و حکمت و تورات و انجیل را
fa.mojtabavi: و او را كتاب و حكمت و تورات و انجيل مى‌آموزد
fa.sadeqi: «و خدا او را کتاب و حکمت و تورات و انجیل می‌آموزد.»
